tr.td: Number of directory entries pointing to inode

ol.li: Locking: i_mutex must be held on both old_dir and new_dir. To avoid deadlock, lock by inode memory address order (lower address first).
Atomicity: The system call ensures that a crash during the move leaves the file in either the source or destination, never both and never neither.
Cross-Directory: If moving a directory, the .. entry must be updated, necessitating a write to the child's data block.

text.tspan: Invariant: New path does not exist.
INVARIANT: Inode 102 is now accessible via NEW name.
INVARIANT: Inode 102 link removed from OLD name.
Atomic move complete at dir-entry level.
